content.body:
leo init creates the full .leo/ structure: config.yaml, default profiles
(generalist, backend-engineer), KB schema, empty index, and generates
CLAUDE.md via ClaudeAdapter. Supports --runtime and --force flags.

CRUD commands use JSONAdapter for all operations:
- read: fetch doc by ID, output formatted JSON
- write: validate schema + persist + rebuild index
- query: filter by --tags, --type, --scope, --lifecycle
- delete: remove doc + rebuild index (requires --force)
- reindex: full index rebuild from docs on disk
- validate: single file or --all KB validation

All commands auto-discover .leo/ by walking up from cwd.

Closes #19, closes #20

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(cli): implement leo init and CRUD commands (read, write, query, delete, reindex, validate)
